class.name: C3Http.Mock

method.name: uninstall
method.description: Uninstalls this mock and restores normal request behavior.

method.name: stub
method.description: Returns a stub builder for [param url]. Omit [param url] to create the catch-all default stub, matched when no URL-specific stub exists. Stubs are evaluated in registration order; the first exact URL match wins, then the first default stub, then an empty [C3Http.Response].

method.name: reset
method.description: Clears all recorded calls and registered stubs.

members.member: Recorded calls in order, newest last. Each entry is a [Dictionary] with keys [code]url[/code] ([String]), [code]method[/code] ([int], [code]HTTPClient.METHOD_*[/code]), [code]headers[/code] ([PackedStringArray]), [code]body[/code] ([Variant]), and [code]options[/code] ([C3Http.Options]).
Total number of calls received since construction or the last [method C3Http.Mock.reset].
The most recent call dictionary, or an empty [Dictionary] if no calls have been made yet.
